title: Cactus bloom!
body: Surprise! This little guy — which Claude identified as a Sand Dollar Cactus, and which looks like a Super Kabuto (or something close) to me — is blooming. It's only been home a few days, so this was a huge treat.

It's actually the first time one of my cactuses has bloomed. I've kept succulents before, but never had a cactus flower for me. The bud came up fuzzy and green out of the woolly crown in the morning, and by the afternoon it had opened into this big pale-yellow flower with a red-orange throat. Here's hoping I can nurture it well enough to do it again.

shots.cap: Open bloom — pale-yellow petals, red-orange throat.
The fuzzy green bud earlier that day, poking out of the woolly crown.
